Mina is learning about India.
India is in Asia.
The capital city is New Delhi.
A map can show where India is.
One known feature is the Himalayas.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the wheel.
What did you notice?

The capital city is Ankara.
A map can show where Turkey is.
One known feature is the Bosphorus strait.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telescope.
What did you notice?

Ravi is learning about Morocco.
Morocco is in Africa.
The capital city is Rabat.
A map can show where Morocco is.
One known feature is the Atlas Mountains.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.

The capital city is Ottawa.
A map can show where Canada is.
One known feature is vast northern forests.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the light bulb.
What did you notice?

Omar is learning about Brazil.
Brazil is in South America.
The capital city is Brasilia.
A map can show where Brazil is.
One known feature is the Amazon region.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.

An important invention was the printing press.
What did you notice?

The capital city is Santiago.
A map can show where Chile is.
One known feature is the Atacama Desert.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the wheel.
What did you notice?

Tara is learning about Mexico.
Mexico is in North America.
The capital city is Mexico City.
A map can show where Mexico is.
One known feature is central highland valleys.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.

An important invention was the steam engine.
What did you notice?

Peru is in South America.
The capital city is Lima.
A map can show where Peru is.
One known feature is the Andes mountains.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the compass.

One known feature is vast northern forests.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the wheel.

A map can show where Brazil is.
One known feature is the Amazon region.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telegraph.

Nia is learning about Japan.
Japan is in Asia.
The capital city is Tokyo.
A map can show where Japan is.
One known feature is many islands.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.

India is in Asia.
The capital city is New Delhi.
A map can show where India is.
One known feature is the Himalayas.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the compass.

People in each place have culture.

An important invention was the printing press.
Why do you think that happens?

One known feature is many islands.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was writing.
Why do you think that happens?

A map can show where Turkey is.
One known feature is the Bosphorus strait.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telegraph.
Why do you think that happens?

A map can show where Norway is.
One known feature is deep coastal fjords.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the steam engine.
Why do you think that happens?

A map can show where Kenya is.
One known feature is the Great Rift Valley.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the compass.
Why do you think that happens?

An important invention was the wheel.
Why do you think that happens?

Why do you think that happens?

Sara is learning about Mexico.
Mexico is in North America.
The capital city is Mexico City.
A map can show where Mexico is.
One known feature is central highland valleys.
People in each place have culture.

Why do you think that happens?

Tara is learning about Peru.
Peru is in South America.
The capital city is Lima.
A map can show where Peru is.
One known feature is the Andes mountains.
People in each place have culture.

One known feature is the Atacama Desert.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telegraph.
Why do you think that happens?

Morocco is in Africa.
The capital city is Rabat.
A map can show where Morocco is.
One known feature is the Atlas Mountains.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the steam engine.

The capital city is Paris.
A map can show where France is.
One known feature is the Seine River.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the wheel.
Why do you think that happens?

The capital city is Santiago.
A map can show where Chile is.
One known feature is the Atacama Desert.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telescope.
Why do you think that happens?

An important invention was the printing press.
Why do you think that happens?

Why do you think that happens?

Priya is learning about Japan.
Japan is in Asia.
The capital city is Tokyo.

How could you check this?

How could you check this?

How could you check this?

Jin is learning about France.
France is in Europe.
The capital city is Paris.
A map can show where France is.
One known feature is the Seine River.

A map can show where Mexico is.
One known feature is central highland valleys.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telegraph.
How could you check this?

A map can show where Canada is.
One known feature is vast northern forests.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the compass.
How could you check this?

An important invention was the wheel.
How could you check this?

The capital city is Mexico City.
A map can show where Mexico is.
One known feature is central highland valleys.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the printing press.
How could you check this?

History studies change over time.
An important invention was the compass.
What would change if one detail changed?

One known feature is many islands.

History studies change over time.
An important invention was the printing press.
What would change if one detail changed?

France is in Europe.
The capital city is Paris.

History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telescope.
What would change if one detail changed?

An important invention was the printing press.

The capital city is Brasilia.
A map can show where Brazil is.
One known feature is the Amazon region.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the steam engine.

A map can show where Turkey is.
One known feature is the Bosphorus strait.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was writing.
Explain it back in your own words.

The capital city is Canberra.
A map can show where Australia is.
One known feature is large desert interior.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the light bulb.
Explain it back in your own words.

A map can show where Egypt is.
One known feature is the Nile River.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telescope.
Explain it back in your own words.

One known feature is the Amazon region.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the wheel.
Explain it back in your own words.

An important invention was the printing press.
Explain it back in your own words.

An important invention was the telegraph.
Explain it back in your own words.

One known feature is the Atacama Desert.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.

An important invention was writing.
Explain it back in your own words.

The capital city is Oslo.
A map can show where Norway is.
One known feature is deep coastal fjords.
People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the light bulb.
Explain it back in your own words.

People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the telescope.
Explain it back in your own words.

History studies change over time.
An important invention was the compass.
Explain it back in your own words.

Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.

People in each place have culture.
Culture includes food, language, music, and customs.
History studies change over time.
An important invention was the printing press.
Explain it back in your own words.
